title: Lucario Overhaul [Cobblemon 1.6 Compatible]
description: A cosmetic datapack for Cobblemon centered around Riolu and Lucario
body:
![Lucario in a row (Riolu, too!)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2a89c40c0cc3876669bc85c21f94bbd8704a42f3.png)
A remodel of Lucario and Riolu aimed at making the line much more expressive, while also adding some fun interactions and outfits to the Pokémon.

#### Current features include:
* A complete remodel of Riolu and Lucario
* Idle, battle idle, walking, swimming, sleeping, cry, and faint animations
* Both Riolu and Lucario now being shoulder mountable
* Multiple Costumes for both Lucario and Riolu


#### Lucario can be put into outfits by right clicking it with certain dyes or wools: 
* Ruins: Lime Dye
* Costume Party: Black Dye
* Martial Arts: Pink Dye
* Concert: Red Dye
* Space: Orange Dye
* Captain: Yellow Dye
* Café: Brown Dye
* Chef: White Dye
* Holiday: Lime Wool
* Take off outfit: Blue Dye


#### Riolu can be given scarves by right clicking it with certain wools:
* PMD Style: Red Wool
* PSMD Style: Green Wool

(Lucario can also be given scarves!)

(Riolu will not retain it's scarf through evolution due to limitations. Sorry!)

#### Planned features include:

* Costumes being turned into forms rather than evolutions once supported
* Running animations once supported
* More Costumes
* Various interaction and idle fidget animations


#### Users and Server owners, feel free to edit and use this pack as you please :)


### Make sure to place the pack in the datapack folder of your world as well as your resource packs folder

### Download the client side version to use base Lucario and Riolu on servers :]

### Need help with the pack? Ask me on discord: @joeseth

Also check out the CurseForge page! https://curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-addons/lucario-overhaul
